notes.body:
# Coffee preference

Coffee preference of the operator: flat white every morning. The coffee preference is stable.

# Superseded note

Old coffee preference: espresso. Replaced by the flat white note.

# Timezone claim A

The team standup timezone is Berlin time according to the calendar invite.

# Timezone claim B

The team standup timezone is Lisbon time according to the latest announcement.

# Deploy step A

Deployment requires the staging gate to pass first.

# Deploy step B

Deployment finishes with the production smoke checklist.
